subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath spoken and caused all things to speak forth in praise of Him Who was wronged throughout all regions, and verily He is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی نطق و انطق کلشیء بثناء من کان مظلوما فی الافاق و انه لهو
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @wisdom [hikmat], @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
